# Data Model: 016-skill-detail-popup

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`
**Date**: 2026-03-04

---

## DB 변경사항

### 신규 테이블: `public.feedback_replies`

| 컬럼 | 타입 | 제약조건 | 설명 |
|------|------|---------|------|
| `id` | `uuid` | PK, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() | 고유 식별자 |
| `feedback_id` | `uuid` | FK → skill_feedback_logs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE | 부모 피드백 |
| `user_id` | `uuid` | FK → auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE | 작성자 |
| `content` | `text` | NOT NULL, CHECK(char_length > 0) | 댓글 내용 |
| `created_at` | `timestamptz` | NOT NULL, DEFAULT now() | 생성 시각 |

**RLS 정책**:
- `SELECT`: 인증된 모든 사용자 허용 (`USING (true)`)
- `INSERT`: 자신의 댓글만 삽입 (`WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id)`)

### 기존 테이블 (변경 없음)

- `public.skill_feedback_logs` — 피드백 저장 (rating 1-5, comment nullable)
- `public.skill_templates` — 템플릿 파일 메타데이터
- `public.skills` — 마크다운 콘텐츠 포함
- `public.profiles` → `public.roles` — 사용자 역할

---

## Domain Types: `src/skill-detail/domain/types.ts`

```typescript
// 팝업에 표시할 스킬 전체 정보
export interface SkillDetailPopup {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly title: string;
  readonly icon: string;
  readonly description: string | null;
  readonly categoryName: string;
  readonly categoryIcon: string;
  readonly markdownContent: string | null;
  readonly authorName: string | null;
  readonly updatedAt: string;
  readonly templates: SkillTemplateInfo[];
  readonly avgRating: number | null;        // AVG(rating), null이면 피드백 없음
  readonly feedbackCount: number;
}

export interface SkillTemplateInfo {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly fileName: string;
  readonly filePath: string;
  readonly fileSize: number;
  readonly fileType: string;
}

// 피드백 + 댓글 묶음
export interface FeedbackWithReplies {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly rating: number;
  readonly comment: string | null;
  readonly userName: string | null;
  readonly createdAt: string;
  readonly replies: FeedbackReply[];
}

export interface FeedbackReply {
  readonly id: string;
  readonly content: string;
  readonly userName: string | null;
  readonly createdAt: string;
}

// 입력 타입
export interface SubmitFeedbackInput {
  readonly skillId: string;
  readonly rating: number;                  // 1-5
  readonly comment?: string;
}

export interface SubmitReplyInput {
  readonly feedbackId: string;
  readonly content: string;
}

// 결과 타입
export type GetSkillDetailResult =
  | { success: true; skill: SkillDetailPopup }
  | { success: false; error: string };

export type GetFeedbacksResult =
  | { success: true; feedbacks: FeedbackWithReplies[] }
  | { success: false; error: string };

export type SubmitFeedbackResult =
  | { success: true; feedback: FeedbackWithReplies }
  | { success: false; error: string };

export type SubmitReplyResult =
  | { success: true; reply: FeedbackReply }
  | { success: false; error: string };

export type GetTemplateDownloadResult =
  | { success: true; signedUrl: string; fileName: string }
  | { success: false; error: string; isViewerBlocked?: boolean };
```

---

## Repository Port: `src/skill-detail/application/ports.ts`

```typescript
import type {
  SkillDetailPopup,
  FeedbackWithReplies,
  FeedbackReply,
  SubmitFeedbackInput,
  SubmitReplyInput,
} from './types'; // re-export from domain

export interface ISkillDetailRepository {
  getSkillDetailPopup(skillId: string): Promise<SkillDetailPopup | null>;
  getFeedbacksWithReplies(skillId: string): Promise<FeedbackWithReplies[]>;
  submitFeedback(userId: string, input: SubmitFeedbackInput): Promise<FeedbackWithReplies>;
  submitReply(userId: string, input: SubmitReplyInput): Promise<FeedbackReply>;
  getTemplateSignedUrl(filePath: string, bucket: string): Promise<string>;
  getUserRole(userId: string): Promise<string | null>;
}
```

---

## Use Cases: `src/skill-detail/application/`

| 파일 | 역할 |
|------|------|
| `get-skill-detail-use-case.ts` | skillId로 SkillDetailPopup 조회 |
| `get-feedbacks-use-case.ts` | skillId로 FeedbackWithReplies[] 조회 |
| `submit-feedback-use-case.ts` | 평점 유효성 검증(1-5) 후 피드백 저장 |
| `submit-reply-use-case.ts` | 댓글 내용 유효성 검증 후 댓글 저장 |
| `get-template-download-url-use-case.ts` | 역할 검증 → viewer 차단 → signed URL 생성 |

---

## Entity Relationships

```
skills (1) ─────────────────── (N) skill_feedback_logs
  │                                       │
  │                                       │ (1)
  │                                       │
  └── (N) skill_templates          (N) feedback_replies

profiles (N) ──── role_id ──── (1) roles
  │
  └── user_id ── skill_feedback_logs
  └── user_id ── feedback_replies
```

---

## 기존 타입과의 관계

| 기존 타입 (admin domain) | 신규 타입 (skill-detail domain) | 차이 |
|------------------------|-------------------------------|------|
| `SkillDetail` | `SkillDetailPopup` | 팝업 전용: avgRating, feedbackCount, authorName 추가 |
| `FeedbackRow` (admin view) | `FeedbackWithReplies` | replies 배열 포함, 팝업 뷰 전용 |
| - | `FeedbackReply` | 신규: feedback_replies 테이블 행 |
| `SkillTemplateRow` | `SkillTemplateInfo` | 동일 데이터, domain 분리를 위한 별도 타입 |
